---
title: "EPPS 6323 – Knowledge Mining"
---

This page contains assignments and labs completed for **EPPS 6323 – Knowledge Mining**.

## Assignments

- [Assignment 01: Brush up R and Quarto](Assignment01.html)
- [Assignment 02: Prompt Exercise](Assignment02.html)

## Labs

- [Lab 01: R Programming Basics I](Lab01.html)
- [Lab 02: R Programming Basics II](Lab02.html)
